description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden barrel with a classic cylindrical shape, slightly bulging at the center and narrowing at the ends. The exterior is constructed from dark brown wooden staves, held together by three prominent black metal hoops, each fastened with copper rivets. The barrel sits horizontally on a sturdy wooden cradle, elevating it slightly above the ground. One end features a brass spigot for dispensing liquids, while the opposite end is plain and sealed. The wood grain and subtle imperfections give it a rustic, aged appearance, making it suitable for storing or dispensing beverages such as wine or beer in an urban or tavern setting.
description: A rustic wooden barrel with black metal hoops, copper rivets, and a brass spigot, resting on a wooden cradle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plain, sealed wooden end with visible metal hoops and rivets.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the barrel, the curvature of the staves, and the supporting cradle.
description_view_2: Front view with the brass spigot clearly visible at the center of the wooden end.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, but with the spigot handle visible on the left.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: black metal hoops with copper rivets
